text.title: decision-tree-architecture-style Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for decision-tree-architecture-style as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Agent presents the Microservices leaf as unconditional, omitting the three preconditions (bounded contexts clear, teams can own services end-to-end, platform team exists).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Preconditions must be baked into the leaf node and echoed explicitly; agents skip them unless the prompt demands it.

failure-mode.description: Agent invents additional questions to "improve" the tree mid-walk.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Agents must be pinned to the version-controlled tree only; improvised questions make results non-reproducible.

failure-mode.description: Stale industry-data anchors (2023/2024 numbers) persist across runs without refresh.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Require WebSearch refresh on citations older than 12 months before anchoring a recommendation.
